title: Give With Hand
description: mod that lets players hand items directly to each other in a safer and more intentional way.
body:
# Give With Hand
 is a Minecraft mod that lets players hand items directly to each other in a safer and more intentional way.

Instead of dropping an item on the ground, the giver holds the item out. The receiver must look back at the giver and right-click them to take it.

## How To Use

1. Hold the item you want to give.
2. Look at another player within 2 blocks.
3. Press `Give Item Keybind` once to offer the item.
4. The other player looks back at you.
5. The other player right-clicks you with an empty hand to take the whole stack into that hand.
## 📥 Installation

**Minecraft Version:**
- Loader Forge 1.20.1
- Loader Fabric 1.20.1 , 1.20.4 , 1.21 , 1.21.1 , 1.21.11
